body_txt: A subtrope of Token Non-Human and Token Enemy Minority . This trope is to Token Enemy Minority as Token Nonhuman is to Token Minority . It's about a member of the Villain or Mook race who joins the main cast and their good (mostly human or The Federation ) organization. There are many shades of this trope which may appear: See also My Species Doth Protest Too Much , Monster Allies , Pet Monstrosity , Token Good Teammate , and Unstable Horror Ally .
